title: Plan and implement agricultural crop maintenance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and implement agricultural crop maintenance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine condition of agricultural crops

pcs.text: Measure and assess soil moisture and calculate soil water percentage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure and assess soil moisture and calculate soil water percentage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure and assess soil moisture and calculate soil water percentage.

pcs.text: Calculate water requirements from soil analysis data, standing crop, and forecasted weather conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate water requirements from soil analysis data, standing crop, and forecasted weather conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate water requirements from soil analysis data, standing crop, and forecasted weather conditions.

pcs.text: Assess nutrient requirements and availability for crops and identify deficiencies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess nutrient requirements and availability for crops and identify deficiencies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess nutrient requirements and availability for crops and identify deficiencies.

pcs.text: Communicate with industry, suppliers and work team to identify factors affecting crop growth and crop load potential
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with industry, suppliers and work team to identify factors affecting crop growth and crop load potential?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with industry, suppliers and work team to identify factors affecting crop growth and crop load potential.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and develop and implement controls procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and develop and implement controls procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and develop and implement controls procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine condition of agricultural crops

elements.title: Determine pest control

pcs.text: Assess evidence of pests and disease and determine control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess evidence of pests and disease and determine control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess evidence of pests and disease and determine control measures.

pcs.text: Locate and identify areas of weed infestation for control or eradication
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and identify areas of weed infestation for control or eradication?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and identify areas of weed infestation for control or eradication.

pcs.text: Select control methods according to workplace management strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select control methods according to workplace management strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select control methods according to workplace management strategies.

pcs.text: Schedule suitable control methods according to crop production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Schedule suitable control methods according to crop production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Schedule suitable control methods according to crop production plan.

pcs.text: Maintain records on infestations and treatments used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records on infestations and treatments used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records on infestations and treatments used.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine pest control

elements.title: Manage crop health

pcs.text: Monitor crop to maintain water and nutritional requirements for optimal production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor crop to maintain water and nutritional requirements for optimal production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor crop to maintain water and nutritional requirements for optimal production.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement sustainable land management practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement sustainable land management practices.

pcs.text: Monitor weed and pest levels according to crop production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor weed and pest levels according to crop production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor weed and pest levels according to crop production plan.

pcs.text: Assess, document and analyse benefits from soil and plant inputs and treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess, document and analyse benefits from soil and plant inputs and treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess, document and analyse benefits from soil and plant inputs and treatments.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and document cropping programs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and document cropping programs.

pcs.text: Document and record data for continual analysis and effective crop management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and record data for continual analysis and effective crop management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and record data for continual analysis and effective crop management.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Manage crop health

elements.title: Review agricultural crop maintenance program

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collate records of crop maintenance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate records of crop maintenance.

pcs.text: Reconcile planned crop maintenance outcomes against targets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reconcile planned crop maintenance outcomes against targets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reconcile planned crop maintenance outcomes against targets.

pcs.text: Review and document changes to crop maintenance program, including the role of technology in improving efficiencies for future implementation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and document changes to crop maintenance program, including the role of technology in improving efficiencies for future implementation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and document changes to crop maintenance program, including the role of technology in improving efficiencies for future implementation.
